G.S.R. 73l(E).———In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (xii) of sub~section (2) of Section 96 of the Protec— tion of Plant Varieties and Farmers’ Rights Act, 2001 (53 of2001), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Protection of Plant Varieties and Farmers’ Rights Rules, 2003, namely :— 1. Short title and commencement.~~—( 1) These rules may be called the Protection of Plant Varieties and Farmers’ Rights (Amendment) Rules, 2008. (2) They shall come into force on the date oftheir publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Second Schedule to the Protection of Plant Varieties and Farmers’ Rights Rules, 2003, after entry 4, the following entry shall be inserted :— Serial No. Fee payable on matters Amount of fee ,; Form number (1) (2) . (3) (4) 4(a) Fees for registration of Extant Variety as notified Rs. 1000 — under Section 5 ofthe Seeds Act,il966 (54 ofl966) (Rupees one thousand only) [F. No. 1-4/2003—SD. y] .. UPMA CHAWDHRY, Jt. Secy. Note .~The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, ride No. G.S.R. 73 8(E), dated the 12 September, 2003.
